# vitest-affected

Intelligent test selection for Vitest. Maintains a dependency graph and runs only tests affected by your changes.

## Commands

| Operation | Command |
|-----------|---------|
| Build | `npm run build` |
| Test | `npx vitest run` |
| Type-check | `tsc --noEmit` |

## Mandatory First Action

**Read root `.gemini/skills/CORE/SKILL.md` for full context.**
